models.name: Claude Sonnet 4
models.description: Balanced frontier model with strong coding, planning, and long-context performance.

models.name: Claude Opus 4
models.description: High-capability model tuned for difficult multi-step engineering and research tasks.

models.name: GPT-4.1
models.description: Reliable general-purpose model with strong coding quality and broad tool ecosystem support.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.description: Large-context multimodal model suited to repo analysis, docs synthesis, and vision-heavy workflows.

harnesses.name: Claude Code
harnesses.description: Terminal-first coding harness with patching, planning, and repo-aware workflows.

harnesses.name: Codex CLI
harnesses.description: OpenAI command-line coding harness with strong editing and explanation loops.

harnesses.name: Gemini CLI
harnesses.description: Google CLI harness optimized for large context and multimodal review tasks.

harnesses.name: OpenCode
harnesses.description: Community-built coding environment with model switching and MCP-friendly workflows.

harnesses.name: OpenClaw
harnesses.description: Composable runtime for autonomous agents with reusable skills and tool orchestration.

combos.name: Claude Opus 4 + Claude Code
combos.description: Best fit for difficult repo surgery, multi-file refactors, and high-judgment engineering work.
combos.notes: Top choice when reasoning depth matters more than raw throughput.

combos.name: Claude Sonnet 4 + Claude Code
combos.description: Fast default setup for day-to-day coding with strong repo awareness and reliable edits.
combos.notes: Best all-around option for active application development.

combos.name: GPT-4.1 + Codex CLI
combos.description: Strong terminal workflow for implementation, explanation, and tight feedback loops.
combos.notes: Great for engineers who want a balanced CLI-first setup.

combos.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro + Gemini CLI
combos.description: Large-context pairing for codebase summarization, docs review, and multimodal analysis.
combos.notes: Useful when image or document context is part of the workflow.

combos.name: Claude Opus 4 + OpenClaw
combos.description: Autonomous-agent pairing for complex orchestration, evaluation loops, and skill composition.
combos.notes: Best fit for agents that need deliberate planning plus reusable skills.

combos.name: Claude Sonnet 4 + OpenCode
combos.description: Solid open tooling stack for teams that want model flexibility and an editor-first workflow.
combos.notes: Good compromise when you want portability and community integrations.

combos.name: GPT-4.1 + OpenClaw
combos.description: Flexible agent stack that benefits from OpenClaw's orchestration and GPT-4.1's ecosystem fit.
combos.notes: Good fallback when teams standardize on OpenAI models.

usecases.name: General Development
usecases.description: Balanced implementation, review, and refactoring across typical software projects.

usecases.name: Complex Development
usecases.description: Hard multi-file engineering work where reasoning depth and planning matter.

usecases.name: CLI Development
usecases.description: Terminal-first workflows focused on iteration speed and shell integration.

usecases.name: Multimodal Analysis
usecases.description: Workflows involving screenshots, documents, diagrams, or mixed media context.

usecases.name: Agent Development
usecases.description: Autonomous or semi-autonomous systems built around tools, skills, and orchestration.

usecases.name: Local Development
usecases.description: Portable, open, and customization-heavy setups for hands-on coding environments.
